records.ety: [F. oriflamme, OF. oriflambe, LL. auriflamma; L. aurum gold + flamma flame; cf. L. flammula a little banner. So called because it was a flag of red silk, split into many points, and borne on a gilded lance.]

defs: The ancient royal standard of France.
A standard or ensign, in battle.
quotes: And be your oriflamme to-day the helmet of Navarre.
